# Correct: large static data is moved to module level to avoid recreation per request
APP_CONFIG = {
    "feature_a": {"enabled": True, "timeout": 30, "retries": 3, "buffer": 1024},
    "feature_b": {"enabled": False, "timeout": 60, "retries": 1, "buffer": 2048},
}

@app.get("/config")
def get_config():
    return APP_CONFIG
